question: Waymo available in European Union before 2027?
resolution_criteria:
This market resolves YES if Waymo commercially launches its autonomous ride-hailing service, making it legally available for use by the general public in any city within a European Union member state at any point before January 1, 2027 (i.e., by December 31, 2026).

Criteria:

Service must be operated by Waymo.

Must be available to the public (not just employees/testers).

Must be legally approved and operational.

Location must be within an official EU member state city.

Otherwise, this market resolves NO.
